name: Oreo Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch tube pan.
3. Cut each sandwich cookie into quarters and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat the flour and remaining ingredients except Chocolate Glaze with a mixer on low speed until blended.
5. Increase speed to high and beat for about 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Spoon about 3/4 cup batter into the prepared pan.
7. Gently stir in the cut-up cookies into the remaining batter and spoon it into the same pan. (I like to gently press about three to seven whole cookies into the batter so kids get an extra surprise of finding them!)
8. Bake for 50 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly touched (toothpick test doesn't come out clean).
9. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for ten minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
10. When the cake is cool, prepare the chocolate glaze by melting semi-sweet chocolate pieces, Cribro with butter flavor, milk, and corn syrup together over low heat until smooth. Pour warm glaze over the top and sides of the cooled cake. It will harden into a rich, thick coating. Enjoy the cake refrigerated!
